positive: A vibrant and whimsical symmetrical pattern featuring stylized bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna. The main elements include gentle, glowing jellyfish with crystalline bells, intricate coral structures, and swirling schools of ethereal, luminous fish. Composition should be highly detailed, suitable for seamless tiling and printed across apparel. Style should blend elements of Art Deco geometry with modern bioluminescence art, emphasizing strong contrast between the deep indigo background and the bright, glowing cyan, magenta, and electric teal subjects. Overhead symmetry, clean silhouettes, and a dreamy, mystical atmosphere. Perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, text, watermark, logo, artifact, low resolution, bad anatomy, ugly, out of frame, poorly drawn, cartoonish, grayscale
